beats.what: The camera captures a wide shot of a pebbly beach with gentle waves washing ashore against a backdrop of green cliffs under a hazy sky.
The waves continue to roll onto the dark, pebbly shore, creating white foam as they meet the sand and stones.
The tide moves steadily, with the white surf spreading across the dark pebbles, highlighting the texture of the shoreline.
The scene remains consistent, showing the rhythmic movement of the ocean waves hitting the pebbly beach near the base of the cliffs.

formal.text: Waves approach a pebbly beach beneath green cliffs.
White foam forms upon the dark stones.
The tide continues its movement across the pebbles.

sarcastic.text: Water hitting rocks. Truly peak cinematic tension.
The surf is doing its thing. Riveting.
Still rocks. Still water. Keep the applause coming.

humorous_tech.text: System boot sequence initiated. Loading scenic environment...
A recurring loop error in the wave physics engine.
Infinite loop detected. Memory leak approaching the shoreline.
Deployment failed. Reverting to original ocean.exe.

humorous_non_tech.text: Nature's way of saying, 'I need a nap.'
The ocean is just doing its laundry again.
Wash, rinse, repeat. No detergent required.
Still washing. Still napping. Send snacks.
